1.title: Connection failures to notification-service
1.description:
## Incident Summary
Incident

## Impact
Customer-facing degradation observed with increased error rates. Approximately 22% of requests affected during peak impact period. Business operations partially disrupted.

## Root Cause Analysis
Initial investigation suggests the issue is related to recent changes in the affected component. Team is analyzing logs, metrics, and traces to identify the exact cause.

## Mitigation Steps
Increased capacity to handle elevated traffic.

## Timeline
- Incident detected via automated monitoring
- On-call engineer paged and acknowledged
- Initial assessment completed
- Mitigation applied
- Monitoring for stability

## Next Steps
- Complete root cause analysis
- Implement permanent fix
- Update runbooks and documentation
- Schedule post-incident review

2.title: CPU spike in service-33
2.description:
## Incident Summary
Incident

## Impact

Initial investigation suggests the issue is related to recent changes in the affected component. Team is analyzing logs, metrics, and traces to identify the exact cause.

## Mitigation Steps
Applied temporary configuration change to stabilize.
